title: Iron Planet
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:IronPlanet.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The "Iron Planet"]]
The '''Iron Planet''' was an [[Iron/Legends|iron]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] in the [[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatoo system]].

==Description==
The "Iron Planet" was notable in that its material was starkly different than the neighboring asteroids in areas circumventing the [[Trader's Grotto]].

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], this asteroid was mined with the hope that it would help quelch high resource demands on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

{{Ast-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
